top_signals.title: Hungary Edges Toward June Interest Rate Cut After Forint Rally
top_signals.summary: Hungary’s central bank is edging toward cutting the second-highest key interest rate level in the European Union following an improvement in the outlook for inflation and local markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Consumer Confidence Eases as Inflation Worries Mount
top_signals.summary: US consumer confidence edged down in May as views of current economic conditions settled back amid rising prices due to the war in Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ethereum treasury firms lean on staking as ETF pressure builds: Report
top_signals.summary: Everstake said staking made up 60% of disclosed revenue among six Ethereum treasury firms, while loss-making companies posted $1.41 billion in losses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Russia tells Marco Rubio U.S. citizens should leave Kyiv ahead of 'systematic' strikes on Ukrainian capital
top_signals.summary: Moscow said it would be launching “systematic and consistent strikes” on the city of Kyiv.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Agencies publish resolution plan feedback letters for certain domestic and foreign banking organizations
top_signals.summary: Agencies publish resolution plan feedback letters for certain domestic and foreign banking organizations
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Fifa World Cup under drone terrorism threat, security experts warn
top_signals.summary: Fifa World Cup organisers will be on alert amid fears domestic terror cells could surface at next month’s tournament, security experts have warned. The quadrennial tournament heads to North America next month for its next iteration – spanning 104 matches in the United States, Canada and Mexico – and keeping the millions of attending fans [...]

top_signals.title: Waller, Policy Risks Have Changed
top_signals.summary: Speech At The Centre for Central Banking Guest Lecture, Frankfurt, Germany

top_signals.title: Bitcoin’s big cup-and-handle pattern targets ‘minimum’ $220K BTC price
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin cup-and-handle chart breakout targets $220,000, but BTC price must first hold the $74,000 support area.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Most planned natural gas pipeline capacity additions in 2026 and 2027 originate in Texas
top_signals.summary: Developers plan to bring approximately 44.9 billion cubic feet per day (Bcf/d) of new pipeline capacity online in the United States in 2026 and 2027, according to our latest Natural Gas Pipeline Projects Tracker. Approximately 70% (31.6 Bcf/d) of this new capacity is already under construction. More than 66% (29.7 Bcf/d) of the capacity additions originate in Texas. Louisiana is second with 19% (8.4 Bcf/d) of total capacity additions.
